creator: vlad-fbsd@acheronmedia.com
text:
Thanks for the submission. I must note that you already update science/py-h5py in another PR:

https://bugs.freebsd.org/bugzilla/show_bug.cgi?id=209630

Which may be in progress by Dmitry. So perhaps drop that port from this batch of patches to avoid collision? Also both patches to it do not update your email addr which, as far as I can tell, is in listed in svn as your old addr?
